whips.name: Basic Whip
whips.description: A standard rope whip. Weakens small creatures slightly.

whips.name: Leather Whip
whips.description: Stiff woven leather. Confidently weakens rare beasts.

whips.name: Iron Whip
whips.description: Studded with iron links. Very effective for epic creatures.

whips.name: Energy Whip
whips.description: Surges with taming energy. Weakens mythic beasts instantly.
